name: Healthcare Provider
description: Hospitals, clinics, physician practices, labs, imaging centers, home health. Direct patient care — highest PHI exposure, strongest workforce requirements.
emphasis_areas: Minimum necessary at care delivery level
Physical facility access (exam rooms, records rooms)
additional_artifacts: Emergency access log and justification records
Medical device inventory and patching records
typical_gaps: Emergency access not logged or reviewed
Medical devices excluded from asset inventory
Shared workstation accounts in clinical areas
Workforce not trained on minimum necessary at role level
No formal process for access review post-termination
